title: CellixJS Azure DevOps Monorepo Pipeline Architecture
citation: CellixJS Docs. Azure DevOps Monorepo Pipeline Architecture. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Vendor/project architecture context for monorepo, Turborepo affected-package analysis, change detection, conditional deployment, and cache strategy.
claims_supported: CellixJS documentation describes a monorepo with API, UI Community, Docs, and shared packages.
CellixJS documentation describes Turborepo affected-package analysis and conditional deployment.
claims_not_supported: That OpenClinXR must use Azure DevOps.
That CellixJS operational patterns are production-ready for OpenClinXR without evaluation.
